removeImageUrlFromFirestore(Event) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.admin.ManageImagesActivity
Helper method to clear the posterUrl in Firestore and refresh the UI.
render() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.admin.ManageEventsActivity
Renders the data present in the eventList onto the user's screen, and allows for the user to delete the event from the database upon clicking the "Delete" button beside an event.
render() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.admin.ManageImagesActivity
Renders the data present in the eventList onto the user's screen, by taking the poster URL and displaying the image associated.
render() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.admin.ManageOrganizersActivity
Renders the data present in the eventList onto the user's screen, by taking deviceId and using it to find the host name.
render() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.admin.ManageProfilesActivity
Renders the data present in the profileList onto the user's screen, and allows for the user to delete the profile from the database upon clicking the "Delete" button beside a profile.
